# v1.2.3

## Changes

- Updated express event information to June
  - You can find the data sheet [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UWJ5TCNZ2kIZxXQwR839c-P1rlivkwdW3fOCMDMXZZo/edit?gid=398356459#gid=398356459). The event multipliers so far:
    - x3 honing chance (not +300% as said in the patch note)
    - -20% cost per tap, except gold which is -60% for 11-14, -40% for 15-18, and shards & seilver which are -40%
    - -40% unlock costs (shard & silver)
    - no discounts for normal honing juices
    - Advanced honing -90% unlock costs
    - AH x2 ancestor's grace
    - AH -70% cost per tap, except shards & silver which are -90%
    - AH juices cost -40%
    - I should note that even without the express event, there's a -20% global discount for advanced honing, the event overwrites that.

  - I don't know how to read game files. I presume Maxroll does that and is much more streamlined & accurate, if you know how to do it & would like to help please do let me know.

  - ~~The only difference from the previous event seems to be the +300% honing rate (+100% last time) and 20% juice discount~~
    - ~~The info came from the [Russian patch note](https://www.reddit.com/r/lostarkgame/comments/1u0dye9/ru_update_details_game_events_and_other_changes/), because the [AGS version](https://www.playlostark.com/en-us/game/releases/the-twilight-isle#:~:text=78%25%20discount%20on%20honing%20materials%20from%201640%20to%201680) is insanely vague and looks straight up AI hallucinated (wtf is 78% discount?).~~
    - ~~In-game information may differ (not just because it's from RU), as they have a [track record of completely lying in the patch note](https://www.reddit.com/r/lostarkgame/comments/1qwskt2/comment/o48gb50/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button).~~

- Various fixes with fetching & creating new characters
